title: ocimastrum
intro: Ocimastrum, commonly known as Ocinum, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to tropical regions. The health benefits of Ocimastrum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which help in soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and protecting against cell damage. The therapeutic actions of Ocimastrum include its ability to relieve stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The bioactive constituents of Ocimastrum include rosmarinic acid, carnosic acid, and ursolic acid, which are responsible for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
